items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Jawann Oldham. Seattle C was drafted 40th in 80 by DEN. Bounced around before getting time w/CHI in 83. NY traded for him in 86. After 1 unhappy yr in NY, bounced around more before retiring in 91. Good shotblocker. Also had epic fight w/Manute. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Jawann Oldham. Seattle C was drafted 40th in 80 by DEN. Bounced around before getting time w/CHI in 83. NY traded for him in 86. After 1 unhappy yr in NY, bounced around more before retiring in 91. Good shotblocker. Also had epic fight w/Manute. RIP.

items.title: messing around with a chart for our next newsletter: the top 16 teams in the WC broken down by the countries of the clubs their players play in!
items.author: shri
items.body_excerpt:
messing around with a chart for our next newsletter: the top 16 teams in the WC broken down by the countries of the clubs their players play in!

Colombia and Morocco have the most "diverse" teams by this metric with 13 and 12 clubs respectively

England and Spain, unsurprisingly, only have 4

images.alt: Sankey diagram showing where players from the 16 remaining World Cup national teams play club soccer, linking each national team to the country of their clubs; England is the largest destination, followed by Spain, France, Italy, and Germany.
